# McpMethods.LoggingSetLevel field

`logging/setLevel` — sets the minimum severity of `notifications/message` the server emits for subsequent requests; Deprecated (§15.3). The server holds the level and gates log emission at or above it.

```csharp
public const string LoggingSetLevel;
```
